Tales on 2 Wheels

India's premier motorcycle riding community based in Bangalore, Karnataka. Group rides to Ladakh, Nepal, Thailand, Munnar, Goa, Rajasthan & across India. Every ride tells a story.

Popular Motorcycle Routes from Bangalore

Bangalore to SakleshpurBangalore to ChikmagalurBangalore to BR HillsBangalore to CoorgBangalore to HampiBangalore to KabiniBangalore to PondicherryBangalore to GokarnaBangalore to MangaloreBangalore to GoaManali to Leh (Himalayan)Kathmandu to Pokhara (Nepal)Bangkok to Chiang Mai (Thailand)
